title: Subscriptions
content:
For Individual Users (Premium Dashboard)

Individual users subscribe to access premium features on the Tklesson platform. There are two billing options:

  • Monthly Plan: $9.99 USD per month, billed every 30 days. Cancel anytime.
  • Yearly Plan: $99.99 USD per year, billed annually. Saves approximately 17% compared to monthly billing.

Both plans include full access to all premium features. Subscriptions can be managed from the Account Settings page within the Premium Dashboard. Users can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel at any time. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing period — no partial refunds are issued for unused time.

Payment methods accepted: Credit card, debit card, and Apple Pay (where available). All transactions are processed securely through Stripe.

For Schools (School Platform)

Schools subscribe based on the number of enrolled students. Tklesson offers five tiers designed to scale with your institution:

TierStudentsMonthlyYearly
Tier 11 – 50$350$4,000
Tier 251 – 100$500$5,500
Tier 3101 – 200$800$8,500
Tier 4201 – 500$1,200$12,500
Tier 5500+$2,000$22,000

All school tiers include:

  • Unlimited teacher accounts
  • Full gradebook access
  • Quiz creation and monitoring
  • Student enrolment management
  • Dedicated support for Tier 4 and Tier 5

Yearly billing saves approximately 8–17% compared to monthly billing, depending on the tier. Schools can manage their subscription from the Subscription tab in the School Admin Dashboard. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next billing cycle. All payments are processed securely through Stripe.
